word: G414 - ἀνεκτότερος - anektóteros - an-ek-tot'-er-os - More tolerable

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνεκτότερος

- Transliteration: Anektoteros

- Phonetic: an-ek-tot'-er-os

- Definition:

1. bearable, tolerable

- Origin: comparative of a derivative of G430

- TDNT entry: 1:359,*

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Comparative of a derivative of G430; more endurable: - more tolerable.
